title: French Fermented Broth Soup
description: A hearty French soup made with fermented broth and silky ingredients. This comforting dish is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat the fermented broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add ground meat and cook until browned, breaking it apart as it cooks.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in the silky cream and let simmer for 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice if desired.
